title: Freedom of Insomnia
description: Completely server-side mod for Fabric that allows players to disable phantom spawning (doInsomnia) individually. You're free to stay awake as long as you want now!
body:
# PLEASE USE [Sensible Sleepiness](https://modrinth.com/mod/sensible-sleepiness/) INSTEAD
I'm no longer interested in developing mods since years ago when my friends moved on from Minecraft and I stopped having a reason to host servers/write mods for them. Sorry~

## Completely server-side mod for Fabric that allows players to disable phantom spawning (doInsomnia) individually a.k.a. per-player phantom spawning.
This means that one player can farm phantom membranes on a server while another player lives their life unbothered by phantoms. By default, however, phantoms are enabled for everyone. ~~*You can technically use this client-side, but... just use the gamerule at that point.*~~ HAHA NOT ANYMORE I FOUND OUT ABOUT `environment`

# Usage: /insomnia <enable|disable|status>  
(This mod requires the Fabric API.)

.

.

oh also check the github source it probably has more updated versions
